title: OLD TOWN CLINIC - 211info
text: OLD TOWN CLINIC OLD TOWN CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Old Town Clinic offers a patient-centered primary care. Services include: care for acute and chronic illnesses, women's health services, such as PAPS, pelvic exams, and breast exams, behavioral healthcare evaluation, substance abuse assessment, naturopathic and acupuncture services. Also offers a variety of wellness programs and activities available to patients, such as yoga. Urgent care for established patients. The pharmacy provides medication education and therapy management, as well as anticoagulation therapy management to current clients. 726 W Burnside Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Clinic hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-5pm, Wednesday 9am-5pm Pharmacy hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8:30am-5:30, Wednesday 9:30am-5:30pm Email (503) 228-4533 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 228-4533 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or by appointment FEES: OHP, sliding scale fees. No one is turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-5pm, Wednesday 9am-5pm Services: Alternative Medicine Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Breast Examinations Community Clinics General Health Education Programs General Medical Care General Physical Examinations Mental Health Evaluation Pap Tests Urgent Care Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - OLD TOWN RECOVERY CENTER SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - RECOVERY CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
